summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2 Connected Operator System features: Quick Actions (Cmd+J), Global Search (Cmd+K), Providers page with bulk actions, sidebar navigation structure, and connection status indicator

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Re-login required after period of inactivity

integration_issues.issue: Inline action buttons (Boost, Limit, Push) not visible on hover in search results

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@autoservice.com / Admin123! works correctly
Dashboard loads with Control Tower title and all metrics
Quick Actions panel opens with Cmd+J keyboard shortcut
Quick Actions shows navigation buttons: Создать заявку, Найти клиента, Найти мастера, Отправить Push, Проблемные заказы, Буст зоны
Quick Actions shows instant actions: Surge, Push, Auto Distribution
Quick Actions panel closes with Escape key
Global Search modal opens with Cmd+K keyboard shortcut
Global Search accepts input and shows search interface
Global Search closes with Escape key
Providers page loads with Provider Control Center title
Providers page has checkbox column for bulk selection
Bulk actions bar appears when providers are selected
Bulk actions bar shows: Boost All, Limit All, Send Push buttons
Providers page has inline action buttons: Boost, Limit, Send
Sidebar navigation grouped by categories: CORE, OPERATIONS, CONTROL, ANALYTICS
Connection status indicator shows 'Live' in sidebar header
Real-time polling connection established and working
All keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+J, Cmd+K) working properly
All UI components render correctly without JavaScript errors
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: Global Search inline actions (Boost, Limit, Push) not appearing on hover over search results. This may be due to no search results being returned or the hover behavior not triggering properly. Consider checking the search API response and hover event handlers.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major features working, minor issue with search inline actions)
